examples: The quadriceps muscle brings your knee into full extension.
Engage your quadriceps (front muscle on thigh) and extend your torso until you can melt over your legs.
When an MRI revealed that I'd torn 90 percent of my right quadriceps, I was flown back to Washington.
Researchers are studying whether athletes are quadriceps-dominant, ligament-dominant, leg-dominant or favor his or her trunk.
The two main exercises for quadriceps include leg extensions (usually done on an exercise machine) and squats.
